scripts.predev: lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3002 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3003 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: docker-compose up -d postgres && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "backend,admin,gate" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix admin-console" "npm run dev --prefix gate-client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix admin-console && npm install --prefix gate-client
